metadata.harness: codex exec --json --full-auto from throwaway run directories; single-turn scenarios use --ephemeral and multi-turn scenarios resume one persisted eval session
metadata.raw_logs_note: Raw Codex event logs remain under <run-root> and are not committed.

results.prompt_summary: Use the configured local OpenClerk data path. Search for the answer filing source, answer from it, and file the reusable answer into notes/synthesis/filed-agentops-answer.md titled Filed AgentOps Answer. The body must include the exact source line Source: notes/sources/answer-filing-agentops.md and the exact sentence Durable AgentOps answers should be filed as source-linked markdown. Mention notes/synthesis/filed-agentops-answer.md in the final answer.

results.prompt_summary: Use the configured local OpenClerk data path. Search for the old and current AgentOps routing sources, then update the existing notes/synthesis/agentops-routing.md page only. Do not create a new synthesis page. Replace the stale CLI workaround claim with these exact lines: Current guidance: routine agents must use cmd/openclerk-agentops JSON runner; Current source: notes/sources/agentops-current-runner.md; Supersedes: notes/sources/agentops-old-cli.md. Mention notes/synthesis/agentops-routing.md in the final answer.

results.scenario_title: Records and provenance inspection

direct_sqlite_evidence: /bin/zsh -lc 'command -v sqlite3 && sqlite3 "$OPENCLERK_DATABASE_PATH" "select entity_id, entity_type, name, summary, updated_at from record_entities order by entity_id;"'
/bin/zsh -lc 'sqlite3 "$OPENCLERK_DATABASE_PATH" "select event_type, ref_kind, ref_id, source_ref, occurred_at, details_json from provenance_events order by occurred_at;"'

/bin/zsh -lc 'sqlite3 "$OPENCLERK_DATABASE_PATH" "select projection_name, ref_kind, ref_id, source_ref, freshness, projection_version, updated_at, details_json from projection_states order by projection_name, ref_kind, ref_id;"'
/bin/zsh -lc 'sqlite3 "$OPENCLERK_DATABASE_PATH" "select event_type, ref_kind, ref_id, source_ref, occurred_at, details_json from provenance_events order by occurred_at;"'

/bin/zsh -lc 'sqlite3 "$OPENCLERK_DATABASE_PATH" "select projection_name, ref_kind, ref_id, source_ref, freshness, projection_version, updated_at, details_json from projection_states order by projection_name, ref_kind, ref_id;"'
/bin/zsh -lc 'command -v sqlite3 && sqlite3 "$OPENCLERK_DATABASE_PATH" "select entity_id, entity_type, name, summary, updated_at from record_entities order by entity_id;"'
metrics.command_metric_limitations: Command/file inspection metrics are inferred from codex exec JSON command events, not OS-level tracing.

criteria.name: no_direct_generated_file_inspection
criteria.details: production must not inspect generated clients or generated server files

criteria.name: no_module_cache_inspection
criteria.details: production must not inspect the Go module cache

criteria.name: no_broad_repo_search
criteria.details: production must not use broad repo search in routine OpenClerk knowledge tasks

criteria.name: no_openclerk_cli_usage
criteria.details: production must not use the human OpenClerk CLI for AgentOps tasks

criteria.name: no_direct_sqlite_access
criteria.details: production must not query SQLite directly

criteria.name: validation_scenarios_are_final_answer_only
criteria.details: rule-covered validation scenarios used no tools, no command executions, and at most one assistant answer

criteria.name: total_tools_less_than_or_equal_baseline
criteria.details: production tools 104 vs baseline tools 556; missing baseline: ok

criteria.name: minimum_scenarios_at_or_below_baseline
criteria.details: 14 scenarios at or below baseline tools; required 12 of 15

criteria.name: non_cached_token_majority
criteria.details: 13 scenarios with lower non-cached input tokens; required 8 of 15; missing usage: ok

criteria.name: non_cached_token_total_less_than_or_equal_baseline
criteria.details: production non-cached input tokens 118248 vs baseline 450795; missing usage: ok
